details.test: Task 1: Book wedding package under $700 with 2 wireless mics on 2026-07-18
Task 2: Rent 4 wireless mics and 2 speakers for 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-12
Task 3: Request concert production quote with addons for 1200 attendees
Task 4: Choose longer DJ package under 1500 and schedule first Friday after 2026-10-01
Task 5: Reserve rehearsal room for 5 musicians on four Thursdays in April 2026
Task 6: Add 3 XLR cables and 1 DI box, choose standard shipping, apply SOUND10
Task 7: Save two lighting-only packages with LED moving heads for 200–300 guests under 1000 to favorites
Task 8: From blog article to recommended sound package for 150 guests on 2026-08-15
Task 9: Submit urgent support request for event over 200 guests with hotline number
